title: Legacy Console Edition Look
description:
This is a resource pack that makes the entire game look just like the good old console days.

Please use this setting:
Graphics: Fablous!

No mods or programmer art needed
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/0aio6CNgTJA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>This is a resource pack that makes the entire game look just like the good old console days. It makes the new textures look like they have been made before 1.14. The game also looks washed out now just like legacy console edition. Makes the panorama look like legacy console edition too. It does not require ANY mods for working. Just turn the resoure pack on, use theese settings and you are good to go! 
Graphics: Fablous! (Required)
Render Distance: 13 
Simulation Distance: 13
FOV: 80 
Brightness: Normal (50) 
Clouds: Fancy 
Smooth Lighting: On 
Entity Shadows: On
Glint Speed: 50
Glint Strength: 75
Attack Indicator: Off (recomended for singleplayer worlds)
Biome Blend:5x5 (Normal)
Entity Shadows: On
